allow: PowerShell(docker exec quizzsloth_mysql mysql -u administrador -p1234 quizzsloth_db -e "SELECT id, nombre, email, odoo_id FROM usuarios WHERE email = 'pablo1@gmail.com';")

PowerShell($login = docker exec quizzsloth_backend curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"pablo1@gmail.com","password":"123456"}'; $token = \($login | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; Write-Host "TOKEN: $\($token.Substring\(0,40\)\)..."; $sub = docker exec quizzsloth_backend curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" http://localhost:3000/auth/me/subscripcion; Write-Host "SUBSCRIPCION: $sub")
